name: opensea-mcp-free
description: OpenSea NFTs as a FREE (non-gated) MCP service: wallet NFT portfolios with images across Ethereum/Base/Arbitrum, NFT + collection detail, floor prices and stats, live listings and best offers, and construction-only NFT transactions — ERC-721 and ERC-1155 transfers, Seaport 1.6 sell listings (EIP-712 order the USER signs, then a guarded relay to OpenSea), listing cancels, and guarded buys of live listings. Ownership is verified on-chain before any build; this service never signs or submits transactions.
